heading: Emergency construction: fortifications
label: 9776 Emergency construction: fortifications
text: If in an emergency the President considers it urgent, a temporary installation or fortification may be built on private land if the owner consents in writing.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)977650:178., J. Res. 21, .Apr. 11, 189830 Stat. 737The word “important” is omitted as covered by the word “urgent”. The words “upon which such work is to be placed” are omitted as surplusage.
Amendments2021— substituted “installation” for “air base”.Pub. L. 116–2831970— struck out “In such a case, does not apply.”Pub. L. 91–393section 175 of title 50
